notes: Official Columbus Coffee Co. menu pages list current brunch, afternoon and drinks items with GST-inclusive prices. Representative items were selected from the official brunch and afternoons-till-late menus.

items.name: Banana Bread & Mascarpone
items.description: Banana bread with espresso mascarpone, rice crisps and citrus honey.

items.name: Chia Pudding & Yoghurt
items.description: Chia pudding with honey Greek yoghurt, granola, bananas, blueberries and almond butter.

items.name: Hotcakes & Passionfruit
items.description: American diner hotcakes with passionfruit curd, blueberries and maple syrup.

items.name: Marmite Mushrooms
items.description: Marmite mushrooms with avocado, kale pesto, pistachio crumb, sunny egg and focaccia.

items.name: Fried Chicken French Toast
items.description: Shokupan French toast with buttermilk fried chicken, hot maple and garlic butter.

items.name: Salmon Poke
items.description: Spicy salmon poke with jammy egg, avocado, edamame and miso vinaigrette.

items.name: Peking Chicken Burger w Curly Fries
items.description: Buttermilk chicken burger with Peking sauce, slaw, red onions and curly fries.

items.name: Eggplant & Shrooms
items.description: Eggplant, tofu, king oyster mushrooms, crispy enoki, nori and Japanese rice.

notes: Official locations page links Dutch Colony cafe menus. Item names, descriptions and prices were checked against current public delivery/menu pages including https://www.foodpanda.sg/restaurant/chms/dutch-colony-coffee-co-elementum and https://www.quandoo.sg/place/dutch-colony-coffee-co-new-tech-park-105292/menu because the official site menu links are not fully exposed as text.

items.name: Brioche Breakfast Burger
items.description: Brioche bun with guacamole, hash, scrambled eggs, turkey bacon and sweet chilli mayo.

items.name: Hearty Breakfast
items.description: Chicken sausage, turkey bacon, scramble, sourdough, mushrooms, tomatoes, hash and avocado.

items.name: Chicken Pesto Cream Linguine
items.description: Linguine with pesto cream, grilled chicken, cherry tomatoes, sous vide egg and parmigiano.

items.name: Seafood Marinara Linguine
items.description: Linguine with tomato sauce, mussels, squid, prawns, cherry tomatoes and parmigiano.

items.name: Angus Beef Burger
items.description: Angus beef patty with turkey bacon, lettuce, tomato, cheese sauce and fries.

items.name: Not-Your-Usual Caesar Salad
items.description: Baby gem lettuce with cucumber, quail eggs, turkey bacon, halloumi and green goddess dressing.

items.name: Parmesan Truffle Fries
items.description: Shoestring fries with truffle oil, grated parmigiano and chives.

items.name: Flat White
items.description: Espresso-based milk coffee.

notes: Official Katong Point Bistro page confirms the outlet and links day, night and drinks menus. Representative item prices were cross-checked against the public Deliveroo Katong Point Bistro menu at https://deliveroo.com.sg/menu/Singapore/katong-joo-chiat/little-farms-bistro-katong-point-shopping-centre because the official Google Drive menu PDFs were not text-accessible during capture.

items.name: Chicken Avocado Sandwich
items.description: Sourdough sandwich with chicken, avocado, sriracha aioli, cheddar, tomato and house salad.

items.name: Avocado, Quinoa & Feta Bowl
items.description: Quinoa bowl with avocado, feta, walnut, blueberry, tomato, greens and lemon miso dressing.

items.name: Chicken Breast Barley Risotto
items.description: Chicken breast served with barley risotto.

items.name: Pan-Seared Salmon
items.description: Pan-seared salmon main course.

items.name: Fish & Chips
items.description: Fish and chips main course.

items.description: Fettuccine pasta with tiger prawns.

items.name: Green Juice
items.description: Juice with cucumber, apple, celery and kale.

items.name: Strawberry Matcha
items.description: Iced matcha with fresh strawberry puree and oat milk.
